description: Semantic caching middleware logic -- embed prompt (via text embedding model), query Supabase AssetLibrary filtered by slot_type, apply threshold gate (cosine similarity > 0.92 = cache hit, skip generation; <= 0.92 = cache miss, generate and cache). Cache hit: return image_url, increment usage_count. Cache miss: call Flux.1 API, apply background removal if needed, upload to R2, INSERT into AssetLibrary. Covers TC-17 (threshold acceptable), TC-18 (slot-type filtering prevents contamination), TC-19 (hit rates 30-60%), TC-20 (query latency negligible).
